data.title: Microservices
data.description: YouTube uses a microservices architecture to separate different parts of the platform for scalability and independent deployment.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A CDN is used to efficiently deliver video content worldwide.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: YouTube employs a variety of databases to handle large-scale data storage and management.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Load balancers distribute the network and application traffic across multiple servers.

data.title: Edge Computing
data.description: Edge computing processes data near the data source to improve response times.
